description: Style NoteGet ready to float in comfort with these Chicane floaters from adidas. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals will perform just as well on everyday walks in the park or a stretch of wild terrain on a trek.Product DetailsSynthetic forefoot straps and ankle straps with Velcro closuresTextured foam footbed Upraised heelTPU outsole with a grooves on the forefootMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
